languages.text: {n}Мертвец молчит несколько секунд — а затем продолжает тем же размеренным тоном, явно не обратив внимания на вашу реакцию.{/n} "Предполагаю, что Фаркир мертв. Прискорбная утрата инструментария и, вероятно, собранных образцов. Впрочем... ответь мне, особь — какова твоя функция?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Мертвец молчит несколько секунд — а затем продолжает тем же размеренным тоном, явно не обратив внимания на вашу реакцию.{/n} "Предполагаю, что Фаркир мертв. Прискорбная утрата инструментария и, вероятно, собранных образцов. Впрочем... ответь мне, особь — какова твоя функция?"

{n}Мертвец молчит несколько секунд — а затем продолжает тем же размеренным тоном, явно не обратив внимания на вашу реакцию.{/n} "Предполагаю, что Фаркир мертв. Прискорбная утрата инструментария и, вероятно, собранных образцов. Впрочем... ответь мне, особь — какова твоя функция?"

languages.text: {n}The dead man remains silent for a few seconds — and then continues in the same measured tone, obviously not paying attention to your reaction.{/n} "I suppose Farkir is dead. A regrettable loss of tools and, most likely, collected samples. Having said that... Tell me, specimen — what is your designated function?"

Прискорбная утрата инструментария и, вероятно, собранных образцов. Впрочем... ответь мне, особь — какова твоя функция?"

{n}The dead man remains silent for a few seconds — and then continues in the same measured tone, obviously not paying attention to your reaction.{/n} "I suppose Farkir is dead. A regrettable loss of tools and, most likely, collected samples. Having said that... Tell me, specimen — what is your designated function?"

languages.text: {n}Der Tote schweigt ein paar Sekunden lang — und fährt dann in demselben gemessenen Tonfall fort, offensichtlich ohne auf Ihre Reaktion zu achten.{/n} "Ich nehme an, Farkir ist tot. Ein bedauerlicher Verlust an Werkzeugen und wahrscheinlich auch an gesammelten Proben. Davon abgesehen... Sagen Sie mir, Exemplar — was ist Ihre Aufgabe?"
languages.original_text: {n}The dead man remains silent for a few seconds — and then continues in the same measured tone, obviously not paying attention to your reaction.{/n} "I suppose Farkir is dead. A regrettable loss of tools and, most likely, collected samples. Having said that... Tell me, specimen — what is your designated function?"

languages.text: {n}Le mort reste silencieux quelques secondes — puis continue sur le même ton mesuré, ne prêtant manifestement pas attention à votre réaction.{/n} "Je suppose que Farkir est mort. Une perte regrettable d'outils et, très probablement, d'échantillons collectés. Cela dit... Dites-moi, spécimen — quelle est votre fonction désignée ?"
languages.original_text: {n}The dead man remains silent for a few seconds — and then continues in the same measured tone, obviously not paying attention to your reaction.{/n} "I suppose Farkir is dead. A regrettable loss of tools and, most likely, collected samples. Having said that... Tell me, specimen — what is your designated function?"

languages.text: {n}死者沉默了几秒钟，然后继续用同样慎重的语气说道，显然没有注意你的反应。{/n}"我想法尔基尔已经死了。很遗憾，他失去了工具，很可能还失去了采集的样本。话虽如此告诉我，标本--你的职责是什么？
languages.original_text: {n}The dead man remains silent for a few seconds — and then continues in the same measured tone, obviously not paying attention to your reaction.{/n} "I suppose Farkir is dead. A regrettable loss of tools and, most likely, collected samples. Having said that... Tell me, specimen — what is your designated function?"

languages.text: {n}El muerto guarda silencio durante unos segundos, y luego continúa en el mismo tono mesurado, obviamente sin prestar atención a tu reacción.{/n} "Supongo que Farkir ha muerto. Una lamentable pérdida de herramientas y, muy probablemente, de muestras recogidas. Dicho esto... Dime, espécimen — ¿cuál es tu función designada?"
languages.original_text: {n}The dead man remains silent for a few seconds — and then continues in the same measured tone, obviously not paying attention to your reaction.{/n} "I suppose Farkir is dead. A regrettable loss of tools and, most likely, collected samples. Having said that... Tell me, specimen — what is your designated function?"

languages.text: {n}死者は数秒間沈黙したままだった--そして、明らかにあなたの反応を気にせず、同じ調子で続けた。{/n}「ファーキールは死んだのだろう。道具と、おそらくは採取したサンプルを失ったのは残念だ。とはいえ...。教えてくれ、標本よ。君の任務は何だ？"
languages.original_text: {n}The dead man remains silent for a few seconds — and then continues in the same measured tone, obviously not paying attention to your reaction.{/n} "I suppose Farkir is dead. A regrettable loss of tools and, most likely, collected samples. Having said that... Tell me, specimen — what is your designated function?"

languages.text: {n}Ölü adam birkaç saniye sessiz kalıyor — ve sonra aynı ölçülü tonda devam ediyor, belli ki tepkinize dikkat etmiyor.{/n} "Sanırım Farkir öldü. Aletlerin ve büyük olasılıkla toplanan örneklerin kaybı üzücü. Bunu söyledikten sonra... Söyle bana numune, senin görevin nedir?"
languages.original_text: {n}The dead man remains silent for a few seconds — and then continues in the same measured tone, obviously not paying attention to your reaction.{/n} "I suppose Farkir is dead. A regrettable loss of tools and, most likely, collected samples. Having said that... Tell me, specimen — what is your designated function?"
